projectDescription: A browser-based WYSIWYG documentation editor with real-time collaboration, Git sync, live preview, and an AI assistant — built to let your whole team write and publish docs without touching code.
keyFeatures: Real-time team collaboration with live cursors
Git-backed publishing — every publish is a commit
Branching and pull request workflow from the browser
Live preview — instant rendering without a build
Preview deployments — shareable URLs per branch
Built-in AI agent for writing, editing, and navigation
Persistent AI instructions for consistent voice and style
Drag-and-drop navigation management synced to docs.json
Comprehensive configurations panel (branding, analytics, SEO, redirects)
publicApiSurface: Editor toolbar: branch selector, Ask Agent (Cmd+I), preview, publish
Navigation sidebar: pages, groups, tabs, anchors, dropdowns, menus, products, versions, languages
Configurations panel: General, Branding, Styling, Typography, Navbar, Footer, Banner, API reference, Redirects, SEO, Analytics, Variables
AI Agent: edit pages, update navigation/docs.json, run bash commands, configure site via code mode
Publishing settings (admin): PR instructions, draft PRs toggle, default merge method
Keyboard shortcuts: Cmd+K, Cmd+I, Cmd+Shift+M, Cmd+Shift+D, Cmd+Shift+F, Cmd+\
